elements.name: igc-column-group
elements.description:
**Ignite UI for Angular Column Group**
---


### **Events:**
 - **hiddenChange** - Emitted when the column is hidden or shown.
- **expandedChange** - Emitted when the column expanded or collapsed.
- **widthChange** - Emitted when the column width changes.
- **pinnedChange** - Emitted when the column is pinned/unpinned.

attributes.name: collapsible
attributes.description: Set if the column group is collapsible.  Default value is `false`

attributes.name: expanded
attributes.description: Set whether the group is expanded or collapsed initially.  Applied only if the collapsible property is set to `true`  Default value is `true`

attributes.name: field
attributes.description: Sets/gets the `field` value.

attributes.name: merge
attributes.description: Sets/gets whether to merge cells in this column.

attributes.name: header
attributes.description: Sets/gets the `header` value.

attributes.name: title
attributes.description: Sets/gets the `title` value.

attributes.name: sortable
attributes.description: Sets/gets whether the column is sortable.  Default value is `false`.

attributes.name: selectable
attributes.description: Returns if the column is selectable.

attributes.name: groupable
attributes.description: Sets/gets whether the column is groupable.  Default value is `false`.

attributes.name: editable
attributes.description: Gets whether the column is editable.  Default value is `false`.

attributes.name: filterable
attributes.description: Sets/gets whether the column is filterable.  Default value is `true`.

attributes.name: resizable
attributes.description: Sets/gets whether the column is resizable.  Default value is `false`.

attributes.name: autosize-header
attributes.description: Sets/gets whether the column header is included in autosize logic.  Useful when template for a column header is sized based on parent, for example a default `div`.  Default value is `false`.

attributes.name: has-summary
attributes.description: Gets a value indicating whether the summary for the column is enabled.

attributes.name: hidden
attributes.description: Gets whether the column is hidden.

attributes.name: selected
attributes.description: Returns if the column is selected.

attributes.name: disable-hiding
attributes.description: Gets whether the hiding is disabled.

attributes.name: disable-pinning
attributes.description: Gets whether the pinning is disabled.

attributes.name: width
attributes.description: Gets the `width` of the column.

attributes.name: max-width
attributes.description: Sets/gets the maximum `width` of the column.

attributes.name: header-classes
attributes.description: Sets/gets the class selector of the column header.

attributes.name: header-styles
attributes.description: Sets conditional style properties on the column header.  Similar to `ngStyle` it accepts an object literal where the keys are  the style properties and the value is the expression to be evaluated.

attributes.name: header-group-classes
attributes.description: Sets/gets the class selector of the column group header.

attributes.name: header-group-styles
attributes.description: Sets conditional style properties on the column header group wrapper.  Similar to `ngStyle` it accepts an object literal where the keys are  the style properties and the value is the expression to be evaluated.

attributes.name: cell-classes
attributes.description: Sets a conditional class selector of the column cells.  Accepts an object literal, containing key-value pairs,  where the key is the name of the CSS class, while the  value is either a callback function that returns a boolean,  or boolean, like so:

attributes.name: cell-styles
attributes.description: Sets conditional style properties on the column cells.  Similar to `ngStyle` it accepts an object literal where the keys are  the style properties and the value is the expression to be evaluated.  As with `cellClasses` it accepts a callback function.

attributes.name: formatter
attributes.description: Applies display format to cell values in the column. Does not modify the underlying data.

attributes.name: summary-formatter
attributes.description: The summaryFormatter is used to format the display of the column summaries.   In this example, we check to see if the column name is OrderDate, and then provide a method as the summaryFormatter  to change the locale for the dates to 'fr-FR'. The summaries with the count key are skipped so they are displayed as numbers.

attributes.name: filtering-ignore-case
attributes.description: Sets/gets whether the column filtering should be case sensitive.  Default value is `true`.

attributes.name: sorting-ignore-case
attributes.description: Sets/gets whether the column sorting should be case sensitive.  Default value is `true`.

attributes.name: searchable
attributes.description: Sets/gets whether the column is `searchable`.  Default value is `true`.

attributes.name: data-type
attributes.description: Sets/gets the data type of the column values.  Default value is `string`.

attributes.name: row-end
attributes.description: Row index where the current field should end.  The amount of rows between rowStart and rowEnd will determine the amount of spanning rows to that field

attributes.name: col-end
attributes.description: Column index where the current field should end.  The amount of columns between colStart and colEnd will determine the amount of spanning columns to that field

attributes.name: row-start
attributes.description: Row index from which the field is starting.

attributes.name: col-start
attributes.description: Column index from which the field is starting.

attributes.name: additional-template-context
attributes.description: Sets/gets custom properties provided in additional template context.

attributes.name: min-width
attributes.description: Sets/gets the minimum `width` of the column.  Default value is `88`;

attributes.name: pinning-position
attributes.description: Gets the pinning position of the column.

attributes.name: pinned
attributes.description: Gets whether the column is `pinned`.

attributes.name: summaries
attributes.description: Gets the column `summaries`.

attributes.name: disabled-summaries
attributes.description: Sets/gets the summary operands to exclude from display.  Accepts an array of string keys representing the summary types to disable, such as 'Min', 'Max', 'Count' etc.

attributes.name: filters
attributes.description: Gets the column `filters`.

attributes.name: sort-strategy

attributes.name: visible-when-collapsed
attributes.description: Indicates whether the column will be visible when its parent is collapsed.

attributes.name: editor-options
attributes.description: Pass optional properties for the default column editors.

attributes.name: parent
attributes.description: Sets/gets the parent column.

elements.name: igc-column
elements.description:
**Ignite UI for Angular Column** -  [Documentation](https://www.infragistics.com/products/ignite-ui-angular/angular/components/grid/grid#columns-configuration)   The Ignite UI Column is used within an `igx-grid` element to define what data the column will show. Features such as sorting,  filtering & editing are enabled at the column level.  You can also provide a template containing custom content inside  the column using `ng-template` which will be used for all cells within the column.

elements.name: igc-grid
elements.description:
Grid provides a way to present and manipulate tabular data.
---


### **Events:**
 - **dataPreLoad** - Emitted when a new chunk of data is loaded from virtualization.
- **groupingExpressionsChange** - Emitted when grouping is performed.
- **groupingExpansionStateChange** - Emitted when groups are expanded/collapsed.
- **groupingDone** - Emitted when columns are grouped/ungrouped.
- **filteringExpressionsTreeChange** - Emitted after filtering is performed.
- **advancedFilteringExpressionsTreeChange** - Emitted after advanced filtering is performed.
- **gridScroll** - Emitted when grid is scrolled horizontally/vertically.
- **cellClick** - Emitted when a cell is clicked.
- **rowClick** - Emitted when a row is clicked.
- **formGroupCreated** - Emitted when formGroup is created on edit of row/cell.
- **validationStatusChange** - Emitted when grid's validation status changes.
- **selected** - Emitted when a cell is selected.
- **rowSelectionChanging** - Emitted when `IgxGridRowComponent` is selected.
- **columnSelectionChanging** - Emitted when `IgxColumnComponent` is selected.
- **columnPin** - Emitted before `IgxColumnComponent` is pinned.
- **columnPinned** - Emitted after `IgxColumnComponent` is pinned.
- **cellEditEnter** - Emitted when cell enters edit mode.
- **cellEditExit** - Emitted when cell exits edit mode.
- **cellEdit** - Emitted when cell has been edited.
- **cellEditDone** - Emitted after cell has been edited and editing has been committed.
- **rowEditEnter** - Emitted when a row enters edit mode.
- **rowEdit** - Emitted when exiting edit mode for a row.
- **rowEditDone** - Emitted after exiting edit mode for a row and editing has been committed.
- **rowEditExit** - Emitted when row editing is canceled.
- **columnInit** - Emitted when a column is initialized.
- **columnsAutogenerated**
- **sorting** - Emitted before sorting expressions are applied.
- **sortingDone** - Emitted after sorting is completed.
- **filtering** - Emitted before filtering expressions are applied.
- **filteringDone** - Emitted after filtering is performed through the UI.
- **rowAdded** - Emitted when a row is added.
- **rowDeleted** - Emitted when a row is deleted.
- **rowDelete** - Emmited when deleting a row.
- **rowAdd** - Emmited just before the newly added row is commited.
- **columnResized** - Emitted after column is resized.
- **contextMenu** - Emitted when a cell or row is right clicked.
- **doubleClick** - Emitted when a cell is double clicked.
- **columnVisibilityChanging** - Emitted before column visibility is changed.
- **columnVisibilityChanged** - Emitted after column visibility is changed.
- **columnMovingStart** - Emitted when column moving starts.
- **columnMoving** - Emitted during the column moving operation.
- **columnMovingEnd** - Emitted when column moving ends.
- **gridKeydown** - Emitted when keydown is triggered over element inside grid's body.
- **rowDragStart** - Emitted when start dragging a row.
- **rowDragEnd** - Emitted when dropping a row.
- **gridCopy** - Emitted when a copy operation is executed.
- **expansionStatesChange** - Emitted when the rows are expanded or collapsed.
- **selectedRowsChange** - Emitted when the rows are selected or deselected.
- **rowToggle** - Emitted when the expanded state of a row gets changed.
- **rowPinning** - Emitted when the pinned state of a row is changed.
- **rowPinned** - Emitted when the pinned state of a row is changed.
- **activeNodeChange** - Emitted when the active node is changed.
- **sortingExpressionsChange** - Emitted before sorting is performed.
- **toolbarExporting** - Emitted when an export process is initiated by the user.
- **rangeSelected** - Emitted when making a range selection.
- **rendered** - Emitted after the ngAfterViewInit hook. At this point the grid exists in the DOM
- **dataChanging** - Emitted before the grid's data view is changed because of a data operation, rebinding, etc.
- **dataChanged** - Emitted after the grid's data view is changed because of a data operation, rebinding, etc.

elements.name: igc-hierarchical-grid
elements.description:
Hierarchical grid
---


### **Events:**
 - **dataPreLoad** - Emitted when a new chunk of data is loaded from virtualization.
- **filteringExpressionsTreeChange** - Emitted after filtering is performed.
- **advancedFilteringExpressionsTreeChange** - Emitted after advanced filtering is performed.
- **gridScroll** - Emitted when grid is scrolled horizontally/vertically.
- **cellClick** - Emitted when a cell is clicked.
- **rowClick** - Emitted when a row is clicked.
- **formGroupCreated** - Emitted when formGroup is created on edit of row/cell.
- **validationStatusChange** - Emitted when grid's validation status changes.
- **selected** - Emitted when a cell is selected.
- **rowSelectionChanging** - Emitted when `IgxGridRowComponent` is selected.
- **columnSelectionChanging** - Emitted when `IgxColumnComponent` is selected.
- **columnPin** - Emitted before `IgxColumnComponent` is pinned.
- **columnPinned** - Emitted after `IgxColumnComponent` is pinned.
- **cellEditEnter** - Emitted when cell enters edit mode.
- **cellEditExit** - Emitted when cell exits edit mode.
- **cellEdit** - Emitted when cell has been edited.
- **cellEditDone** - Emitted after cell has been edited and editing has been committed.
- **rowEditEnter** - Emitted when a row enters edit mode.
- **rowEdit** - Emitted when exiting edit mode for a row.
- **rowEditDone** - Emitted after exiting edit mode for a row and editing has been committed.
- **rowEditExit** - Emitted when row editing is canceled.
- **columnInit** - Emitted when a column is initialized.
- **columnsAutogenerated**
- **sorting** - Emitted before sorting expressions are applied.
- **sortingDone** - Emitted after sorting is completed.
- **filtering** - Emitted before filtering expressions are applied.
- **filteringDone** - Emitted after filtering is performed through the UI.
- **rowAdded** - Emitted when a row is added.
- **rowDeleted** - Emitted when a row is deleted.
- **rowDelete** - Emmited when deleting a row.
- **rowAdd** - Emmited just before the newly added row is commited.
- **columnResized** - Emitted after column is resized.
- **contextMenu** - Emitted when a cell or row is right clicked.
- **doubleClick** - Emitted when a cell is double clicked.
- **columnVisibilityChanging** - Emitted before column visibility is changed.
- **columnVisibilityChanged** - Emitted after column visibility is changed.
- **columnMovingStart** - Emitted when column moving starts.
- **columnMoving** - Emitted during the column moving operation.
- **columnMovingEnd** - Emitted when column moving ends.
- **gridKeydown** - Emitted when keydown is triggered over element inside grid's body.
- **rowDragStart** - Emitted when start dragging a row.
- **rowDragEnd** - Emitted when dropping a row.
- **gridCopy** - Emitted when a copy operation is executed.
- **expansionStatesChange** - Emitted when the rows are expanded or collapsed.
- **selectedRowsChange** - Emitted when the rows are selected or deselected.
- **rowToggle** - Emitted when the expanded state of a row gets changed.
- **rowPinning** - Emitted when the pinned state of a row is changed.
- **rowPinned** - Emitted when the pinned state of a row is changed.
- **activeNodeChange** - Emitted when the active node is changed.
- **sortingExpressionsChange** - Emitted before sorting is performed.
- **toolbarExporting** - Emitted when an export process is initiated by the user.
- **rangeSelected** - Emitted when making a range selection.
- **rendered** - Emitted after the ngAfterViewInit hook. At this point the grid exists in the DOM
- **dataChanging** - Emitted before the grid's data view is changed because of a data operation, rebinding, etc.
- **dataChanged** - Emitted after the grid's data view is changed because of a data operation, rebinding, etc.

elements.name: igc-row-island
elements.description:
Row island
---


### **Events:**
 - **gridCreated** - Event emitted when a grid is being created based on this row island.
- **gridInitialized** - Emitted after a grid is being initialized for this row island.  The emitting is done in `ngAfterViewInit`.
- **dataPreLoad** - Emitted when a new chunk of data is loaded from virtualization.
- **filteringExpressionsTreeChange** - Emitted after filtering is performed.
- **advancedFilteringExpressionsTreeChange** - Emitted after advanced filtering is performed.
- **gridScroll** - Emitted when grid is scrolled horizontally/vertically.
- **cellClick** - Emitted when a cell is clicked.
- **rowClick** - Emitted when a row is clicked.
- **formGroupCreated** - Emitted when formGroup is created on edit of row/cell.
- **validationStatusChange** - Emitted when grid's validation status changes.
- **selected** - Emitted when a cell is selected.
- **rowSelectionChanging** - Emitted when `IgxGridRowComponent` is selected.
- **columnSelectionChanging** - Emitted when `IgxColumnComponent` is selected.
- **columnPin** - Emitted before `IgxColumnComponent` is pinned.
- **columnPinned** - Emitted after `IgxColumnComponent` is pinned.
- **cellEditEnter** - Emitted when cell enters edit mode.
- **cellEditExit** - Emitted when cell exits edit mode.
- **cellEdit** - Emitted when cell has been edited.
- **cellEditDone** - Emitted after cell has been edited and editing has been committed.
- **rowEditEnter** - Emitted when a row enters edit mode.
- **rowEdit** - Emitted when exiting edit mode for a row.
- **rowEditDone** - Emitted after exiting edit mode for a row and editing has been committed.
- **rowEditExit** - Emitted when row editing is canceled.
- **columnInit** - Emitted when a column is initialized.
- **columnsAutogenerated**
- **sorting** - Emitted before sorting expressions are applied.
- **sortingDone** - Emitted after sorting is completed.
- **filtering** - Emitted before filtering expressions are applied.
- **filteringDone** - Emitted after filtering is performed through the UI.
- **rowAdded** - Emitted when a row is added.
- **rowDeleted** - Emitted when a row is deleted.
- **rowDelete** - Emmited when deleting a row.
- **rowAdd** - Emmited just before the newly added row is commited.
- **columnResized** - Emitted after column is resized.
- **contextMenu** - Emitted when a cell or row is right clicked.
- **doubleClick** - Emitted when a cell is double clicked.
- **columnVisibilityChanging** - Emitted before column visibility is changed.
- **columnVisibilityChanged** - Emitted after column visibility is changed.
- **columnMovingStart** - Emitted when column moving starts.
- **columnMoving** - Emitted during the column moving operation.
- **columnMovingEnd** - Emitted when column moving ends.
- **gridKeydown** - Emitted when keydown is triggered over element inside grid's body.
- **rowDragStart** - Emitted when start dragging a row.
- **rowDragEnd** - Emitted when dropping a row.
- **gridCopy** - Emitted when a copy operation is executed.
- **expansionStatesChange** - Emitted when the rows are expanded or collapsed.
- **selectedRowsChange** - Emitted when the rows are selected or deselected.
- **rowToggle** - Emitted when the expanded state of a row gets changed.
- **rowPinning** - Emitted when the pinned state of a row is changed.
- **rowPinned** - Emitted when the pinned state of a row is changed.
- **activeNodeChange** - Emitted when the active node is changed.
- **sortingExpressionsChange** - Emitted before sorting is performed.
- **toolbarExporting** - Emitted when an export process is initiated by the user.
- **rangeSelected** - Emitted when making a range selection.
- **rendered** - Emitted after the ngAfterViewInit hook. At this point the grid exists in the DOM
- **dataChanging** - Emitted before the grid's data view is changed because of a data operation, rebinding, etc.
- **dataChanged** - Emitted after the grid's data view is changed because of a data operation, rebinding, etc.

elements.name: igc-pivot-grid
elements.description:
Pivot Grid provides a way to present and manipulate data in a pivot table view.
---


### **Events:**
 - **dimensionsChange** - Emitted when the dimension collection is changed via the grid chip area.
- **pivotConfigurationChange** - Emitted when any of the pivotConfiguration properties is changed via the grid chip area.
- **dimensionInit** - Emitted when the dimension is initialized.
- **valueInit** - Emitted when the value is initialized.
- **dimensionsSortingExpressionsChange** - Emitted when a dimension is sorted.
- **valuesChange** - Emitted when the values collection is changed via the grid chip area.
- **filteringExpressionsTreeChange** - Emitted after filtering is performed.
- **advancedFilteringExpressionsTreeChange** - Emitted after advanced filtering is performed.
- **gridScroll** - Emitted when grid is scrolled horizontally/vertically.
- **cellClick** - Emitted when a cell is clicked.
- **rowClick** - Emitted when a row is clicked.
- **formGroupCreated** - Emitted when formGroup is created on edit of row/cell.
- **validationStatusChange** - Emitted when grid's validation status changes.
- **selected** - Emitted when a cell is selected.
- **rowSelectionChanging** - Emitted when `IgxGridRowComponent` is selected.
- **columnSelectionChanging** - Emitted when `IgxColumnComponent` is selected.
- **columnPin** - Emitted before `IgxColumnComponent` is pinned.
- **columnPinned** - Emitted after `IgxColumnComponent` is pinned.
- **cellEditEnter** - Emitted when cell enters edit mode.
- **cellEditExit** - Emitted when cell exits edit mode.
- **cellEdit** - Emitted when cell has been edited.
- **cellEditDone** - Emitted after cell has been edited and editing has been committed.
- **rowEditEnter** - Emitted when a row enters edit mode.
- **rowEdit** - Emitted when exiting edit mode for a row.
- **rowEditDone** - Emitted after exiting edit mode for a row and editing has been committed.
- **rowEditExit** - Emitted when row editing is canceled.
- **columnInit** - Emitted when a column is initialized.
- **columnsAutogenerated**
- **sorting** - Emitted before sorting expressions are applied.
- **sortingDone** - Emitted after sorting is completed.
- **filtering** - Emitted before filtering expressions are applied.
- **filteringDone** - Emitted after filtering is performed through the UI.
- **rowAdded** - Emitted when a row is added.
- **rowDeleted** - Emitted when a row is deleted.
- **rowDelete** - Emmited when deleting a row.
- **rowAdd** - Emmited just before the newly added row is commited.
- **columnResized** - Emitted after column is resized.
- **contextMenu** - Emitted when a cell or row is right clicked.
- **doubleClick** - Emitted when a cell is double clicked.
- **columnVisibilityChanging** - Emitted before column visibility is changed.
- **columnVisibilityChanged** - Emitted after column visibility is changed.
- **columnMovingStart** - Emitted when column moving starts.
- **columnMoving** - Emitted during the column moving operation.
- **columnMovingEnd** - Emitted when column moving ends.
- **gridKeydown** - Emitted when keydown is triggered over element inside grid's body.
- **rowDragStart** - Emitted when start dragging a row.
- **rowDragEnd** - Emitted when dropping a row.
- **gridCopy** - Emitted when a copy operation is executed.
- **expansionStatesChange** - Emitted when the rows are expanded or collapsed.
- **selectedRowsChange** - Emitted when the rows are selected or deselected.
- **rowToggle** - Emitted when the expanded state of a row gets changed.
- **rowPinning** - Emitted when the pinned state of a row is changed.
- **rowPinned** - Emitted when the pinned state of a row is changed.
- **activeNodeChange** - Emitted when the active node is changed.
- **sortingExpressionsChange** - Emitted before sorting is performed.
- **toolbarExporting** - Emitted when an export process is initiated by the user.
- **rangeSelected** - Emitted when making a range selection.
- **rendered** - Emitted after the ngAfterViewInit hook. At this point the grid exists in the DOM
- **dataChanging** - Emitted before the grid's data view is changed because of a data operation, rebinding, etc.
- **dataChanged** - Emitted after the grid's data view is changed because of a data operation, rebinding, etc.

elements.description:
**Ignite UI for Angular Tree Grid** -  [Documentation](https://www.infragistics.com/products/ignite-ui-angular/angular/components/grid/grid)   The Ignite UI Tree Grid displays and manipulates hierarchical data with consistent schema formatted as a table and  provides features such as sorting, filtering, editing, column pinning, paging, column moving and hiding.   Example:
---


### **Events:**
 - **filteringExpressionsTreeChange** - Emitted after filtering is performed.
- **advancedFilteringExpressionsTreeChange** - Emitted after advanced filtering is performed.
- **gridScroll** - Emitted when grid is scrolled horizontally/vertically.
- **cellClick** - Emitted when a cell is clicked.
- **rowClick** - Emitted when a row is clicked.
- **formGroupCreated** - Emitted when formGroup is created on edit of row/cell.
- **validationStatusChange** - Emitted when grid's validation status changes.
- **selected** - Emitted when a cell is selected.
- **rowSelectionChanging** - Emitted when `IgxGridRowComponent` is selected.
- **columnSelectionChanging** - Emitted when `IgxColumnComponent` is selected.
- **columnPin** - Emitted before `IgxColumnComponent` is pinned.
- **columnPinned** - Emitted after `IgxColumnComponent` is pinned.
- **cellEditEnter** - Emitted when cell enters edit mode.
- **cellEditExit** - Emitted when cell exits edit mode.
- **cellEdit** - Emitted when cell has been edited.
- **cellEditDone** - Emitted after cell has been edited and editing has been committed.
- **rowEditEnter** - Emitted when a row enters edit mode.
- **rowEdit** - Emitted when exiting edit mode for a row.
- **rowEditDone** - Emitted after exiting edit mode for a row and editing has been committed.
- **rowEditExit** - Emitted when row editing is canceled.
- **columnInit** - Emitted when a column is initialized.
- **columnsAutogenerated**
- **sorting** - Emitted before sorting expressions are applied.
- **sortingDone** - Emitted after sorting is completed.
- **filtering** - Emitted before filtering expressions are applied.
- **filteringDone** - Emitted after filtering is performed through the UI.
- **rowAdded** - Emitted when a row is added.
- **rowDeleted** - Emitted when a row is deleted.
- **rowDelete** - Emmited when deleting a row.
- **rowAdd** - Emmited just before the newly added row is commited.
- **columnResized** - Emitted after column is resized.
- **contextMenu** - Emitted when a cell or row is right clicked.
- **doubleClick** - Emitted when a cell is double clicked.
- **columnVisibilityChanging** - Emitted before column visibility is changed.
- **columnVisibilityChanged** - Emitted after column visibility is changed.
- **columnMovingStart** - Emitted when column moving starts.
- **columnMoving** - Emitted during the column moving operation.
- **columnMovingEnd** - Emitted when column moving ends.
- **gridKeydown** - Emitted when keydown is triggered over element inside grid's body.
- **rowDragStart** - Emitted when start dragging a row.
- **rowDragEnd** - Emitted when dropping a row.
- **gridCopy** - Emitted when a copy operation is executed.
- **expansionStatesChange** - Emitted when the rows are expanded or collapsed.
- **selectedRowsChange** - Emitted when the rows are selected or deselected.
- **rowToggle** - Emitted when the expanded state of a row gets changed.
- **rowPinning** - Emitted when the pinned state of a row is changed.
- **rowPinned** - Emitted when the pinned state of a row is changed.
- **activeNodeChange** - Emitted when the active node is changed.
- **sortingExpressionsChange** - Emitted before sorting is performed.
- **toolbarExporting** - Emitted when an export process is initiated by the user.
- **rangeSelected** - Emitted when making a range selection.
- **rendered** - Emitted after the ngAfterViewInit hook. At this point the grid exists in the DOM
- **dataChanging** - Emitted before the grid's data view is changed because of a data operation, rebinding, etc.
- **dataChanged** - Emitted after the grid's data view is changed because of a data operation, rebinding, etc.

elements.name: igc-paginator
elements.description:
Paginator component description
---


### **Events:**
 - **perPageChange** - Emitted when `perPage` property value of the paginator is changed.
- **pageChange** - Emitted after the current page is changed.
- **paging** - Emitted before paging is performed.
- **pagingDone** - Emitted after paging is performed.

attributes.description: Total pages calculated from totalRecords and perPage

attributes.name: page
attributes.description: Gets/Sets the current page of the paginator.  The default is 0.

attributes.name: per-page
attributes.description: Gets/Sets the number of visible items per page in the paginator.  The default is 15.

attributes.name: total-records
attributes.description: Sets the total records.

attributes.name: select-options
attributes.description: Sets custom options in the select of the paginator

attributes.name: overlay-settings
attributes.description: Sets custom OverlaySettings.
